title: Section 3
content: 1[3. Extent of jurisdiction of High Court.-- The High Court shall, in respect of proceedings instituted by or against the Official Trustee under this Act or the Indian Trusts Act, 1882 (2 of 1882), be a competent Court throughout the territories in relation to which it exercises civil appellate jurisdiction: Provided that nothing in this section shall be construed as affecting the jurisdiction of any district court.
footnote: 1. Ins. by s. 4, ibid., s. 3, Earlier section 3 was omitted by the A.O. (No. 2) 1956.
